name: Ground Beef Pasta with Garlic-Yogurt Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Gently sauté the onion in olive oil, for 2-3 minutes over medium heat. Add in the ground beef and cook for 10
minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook pasta, according package instructions. Drain and set aside. Melt the butter in a large pot and toss
Serve the pasta, top with the cooked ground beef and covered with the garlic-yogurt sauce.
This classic dish is a family favorite, and for a good reason. Baked Turkey Tetrazzini is rich, creamy comfort food.
It also happens to be very easy to make, as long as you have the ingredients on hand! This recipe only takes about
45 minutes from start to finish and tastes delicious with some crusty bread for dipping in the sauce.
